body:
Two more sets to review alongside the rock pile. All are 32x32 pixel art for an industrial game.

**2) Debris/metal sheets** — 64 candidates:
https://backblaze.pixellab.ai/file/pixellab-characters/objects/cc4c304f-c805-41e2-b1b6-6e7e47fcb9fc/ec6d8d0a-d7a1-419e-bd76-fc093cfb1f51/rotations/frame_{0..63}.png

**3) Bushes/undergrowth** — 64 candidates:
https://backblaze.pixellab.ai/file/pixellab-characters/objects/cc4c304f-c805-41e2-b1b6-6e7e47fcb9fc/0eed43e8-f498-4529-a559-217a92d6b221/rotations/frame_{0..63}.png

Reply with the best 1-3 indices for each.
